blocks.body: Verb to Be: Past Forms — was and were in simple past statements, negatives, and questions.

{ "title": "6. Short summary", "items": [ "The past form of to be = was / were.", "Use was with I / he / she / it.", "Use were with you / we / they.", "Negatives: wasn't / weren't.", "Questions: Was...? / Were...?", "In short answers, repeat was / were: Yes, I was. / No, they weren't." ] }
